productName: SPR - 1g HASH ROSIN - Stuffed Cherry Zlushiez
description: A purist's hybrid hash rosin: Stuffed Cherry Zlushiez refined first into full-melt hash, then squeezed solventless under heat and pressure for the cleanest, most flavorful dab going. Smooth, potent, and terp-heavy — a sweet, ripe cherry flavor, leading into a versatile, anytime balance.
